name: Cleanlab
pricing_notes: OSS library free; Cleanlab Studio: free tier (50K rows); Pro $99/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: OSS: no auth; Cleanlab Studio: API key from Studio dashboard

performance.notes: Label issue detection scales with dataset size (seconds to hours); vectorized NumPy operations

agent_readiness.notes: Data-centric AI library for finding label errors in ML training datasets. Cleanlab Studio adds web UI and LLM-powered data curation. Detects mislabeled data, outliers, near-duplicates. Works with any model predictions (scikit-learn, PyTorch, TF). Python library with NumPy/pandas integration. REST API for Studio cloud platform.

gotchas: Requires model predictions as input — needs trained model even for label checking
Studio REST API less documented than Python library
Large datasets can be memory-intensive in OSS library
LLM-based curation in Studio still maturing
best_when: Improving ML model accuracy by cleaning training data label errors
Datasets with suspected high label noise from crowdsourcing
LLM fine-tuning data quality validation before training
Finding outliers and near-duplicates in large datasets
avoid_when: No existing model predictions to work from (OSS requires predictions)
Simple rule-based data validation (Great Expectations simpler)
Real-time data quality monitoring (batch-oriented, not streaming)
summary: Cleanlab is a data-centric AI library for finding and fixing label errors in ML training datasets. Given model predictions, it identifies mislabeled data, outliers, and near-duplicates using confident learning theory. Python library with scikit-learn/PyTorch integration. Cleanlab Studio adds web UI and LLM-powered curation. Essential for improving ML model quality when training data quality is suspect.
